subject: [PATCH v2 09/10] nfsd: make the copy offload stateid a first-class nfs4_stid

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch promotes the async COPY offload stateid to a first-class nfs4_stid, making it per-client and reusing common id allocation and refcounting mechanisms. It removes bespoke initialization and teardown functions for copy stateids and leaves the global table exclusively for COPY_NOTIFY stateids. The lifetime model of async copies remains unchanged.
